svg.title: AI E-commerce Decision Intelligence Platform — Full Architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer architecture from raw data sources at the top down to the business dashboard at the bottom, with an MLOps pipeline running alongside all layers.
svg.text: MLOps — MLflow · DVC · Docker · Prefect · CI/CD

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the data sources layer in detail')
g.text: Kaggle store-sales CSV · transaction logs · product catalog · web events
Ingestion · cleaning · feature engineering · DVC versioning · feature store

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the sales prediction model in depth')
sendPrompt('Explain anomaly detection with PyOD and Autoencoder')
sendPrompt('How does SHAP explain model predictions?')
sendPrompt('What business recommendations does the platform generate?')
sendPrompt('How does MLflow fit into this project?')
g.text: MLflow — experiment tracking · model registry · artifact store

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Prefect orchestrate the ML pipeline?')
g.text: Orchestration — Prefect · scheduled retraining · drift detection · alerts

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the Streamlit dashboard display?')
g.text: Sales forecast chart · anomaly alerts · SHAP explanations · restock table

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I deploy this with Docker and GitHub Actions?')
g.text: Deployment — Docker Compose · GitHub Actions CI/CD · cloud (Railway / Render)

svg.text: Click any layer to go deeper
